programme.sub-title: Drugs, Bugs and the Big Buy-Bust

programme.desc: Border Patrol chases suspect fleeing arrest; CBP stops weed leaving the U.S.

programme.title: Amsterdam Narcos
programme.desc: The 70s brought organized crime and violence to Amsterdam's drug scene.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Colombia
programme.desc: After an inspection reveals that a pair of innocent-looking high heels are more than they seem, the passenger carrying them claims he was doing someone a favor without realizing what they were.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Colombia
programme.desc: Officials at Colombia's largest airport must put a stop to smugglers moving drugs in laptops.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Colombia
programme.desc: Security officers in Colombia's largest airport find smuggled cocaine in cans of deodorant.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Colombia
programme.desc: Security officers in Colombia's largest airport keep criminals out.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler: Colombia
programme.desc: After being arrested with cocaine in his suitcase, a man accuses his son-in-law of tricking him; two individuals posing as a couple of young tourists turn out to be complete strangers carrying cocaine capsules inside their bodies.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix
programme.desc: The illegal drug trade and cartel involvement in Houston; trafficking and the tourist industry in Las Vegas; enhanced.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking college students and money-hungry drug dealers collide during Florida's spring break; enhanced.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix
programme.desc: Tales of dealers, police and snitches in Minnesota's Twin Cities; enhanced.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix
programme.desc: Baltimore is the heroin capital of the United States; everyone on the street is grinding for dope money; now, the hustle mind set is spreading to the suburbs; enhanced.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix
programme.desc: In Alaska, dealers make vast profits from crack, heroin and illicit alcohol; violent street gangs battle for control of the drug market in Anchorage, Alaska.

programme.desc: The Austin music scene veils a darker revelry: a highly competitive drug trade.

programme.title: Incredible Animal Journeys
programme.desc: A look at the migration patterns of millions of animals on this planet that have been passed down for generations.

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: The North and South poles are home to the world's most ultimate survivalists, including Arctic wolves and polar bears, creatures that are tested to the extreme.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: Deserts are getting even hotter, drier and bigger, yet a host of remarkable animals still survive in the harshest of conditions, including cunning hyenas, pint-sized meerkats and sand-dwelling spiders.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: Jungles comprise the most diverse habitats on Earth in which only the resilient species can triumph; these jungle species include jaguars, caimans, gibbons, orangutans, spectral tarsiers, hummingbirds and parasites.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: In the grasslands, animals endure freezes, fires, floods and droughts; bull elephants clash in mating battles; cheetahs and gazelles engage in a predator-and-prey dance in the Kenyan savanna; bison battle a blizzard while being pursued by wolves.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: Delving beneath the surface of the Earth's oceans to uncover a world of extraordinary extremes, including crushing depths, stormy coasts, vast blue deserts, and crowded reefs; how seals fend off sharks; how orcas fight to survive.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: The highest mountains on Earth are home to snow leopards, golden eagles, mountain goats, barnacle goslings, and gelada monkeys; only the toughest of animals can endure the extreme weather, scarce food supplies and limited oxygen on these peaks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Discovered By Disaster
programme.desc: Analyze fish remains found near an angry Sumatran volcano that could suggest a new human migration route; visit a prehistoric village smoked out by a forest fire, a collapsed kingdom in Turkey, and evidence of early Olympic sacrificial rituals.

programme.title: Discovered By Disaster
programme.desc: Visit Cambodia, where record droughts have left a trade hub exposed; examine a submerged funerary complex in Greece, ancient mammal footprints preserved by a Turkish volcanic eruption and North American fossils from the post-dinosaur era.

programme.title: Discovered By Disaster
programme.desc: Explore evidence that ties a meteor strike to a Biblical tale; delve into a treasure-filled tunnel revealed by a sinkhole in Mexico, a medieval cave shrine exposed during a UK landslide and famine warnings brought to light by a severe drought.

programme.title: Discovered By Disaster
programme.desc: Earthquakes, droughts and collapsing dams expose artifacts and graves.

programme.title: Discovered By Disaster
programme.desc: Revisiting a medieval shipwreck that could reshape history; exploring a Greek version of Atlantis that sank in a tsunami, a Mexican temple rediscovered in the wake of a severe drought and rich remnants of an ancient city.

programme.title: Tsunami: Race Against Time
programme.desc: The devastating tsunami makes landfall, catching thousands unaware.

programme.desc: As the tsunami hits Thailand, tourists and locals fight for survival.
